info.name: 📌 ElevenLabs API
info.description:
### About

"ElevenLabs is an AI audio research and deployment company."

### Prerequisites

- Postman Account
    
- ElevenLabs Account: [https://elevenlabs.io/app/home](https://elevenlabs.io/app/home)
    

### Usage

1. Create a fork
    
2. Update collection variables
    
3. Send requests
    

### Documentation

- API: [https://elevenlabs.io/docs/api-reference/introduction](https://elevenlabs.io/docs/api-reference/introduction)
    
- Models: [https://elevenlabs.io/docs/models](https://elevenlabs.io/docs/models)

request.description:
1. Click send and download
    
2. Convert file format if needed

1. Click send and download
    
2. Convert file format if needed

2. Convert file format if needed
